case_title: NAM Q. TRINH VS. HIEN HUU HUYNH

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TRINH, NAM Q. AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, HIEN HUU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED APR-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, HIEN HUU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER MIMI S.J. LIAN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. MOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINH, NAM Q. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUYNH, HIEN HUU $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, HIEN HUU
